Consolidate multiple wikidata link templates into single one at end
Text replacement - "is a shrine in the Engishiki Jinmyōchō." to "is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]."
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵↵↵" to " "

{{nihongo|'''Kamono Shrine'''|鴨神社 (東みよし町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamono Shrine'''|鴨神社 (東みよし町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamono Shrine'''|鴨神社 (東みよし町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamono Shrine'''|鴨神社 (東みよし町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].
